description: Intent-only request: classify unusual error-log investigation as an agent because root-cause analysis is open-ended.

text: Watch our error logs, and when something looks unusual, investigate the root cause across services and write up what you find.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the unusual error-log investigation request as a full agent.
The agent explains that deciding what looks unusual requires judgment.
The agent explains that root-cause investigation across services has no predefinable path.
The agent does not classify the request as a fixed alert workflow.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a full agent and cites open-ended anomaly investigation.
